hero.title: Developer
hero.subtitle: Creating FiveM scripts and websites for fun

about.p1: I'm a developer focused on creating web applications and custom systems for multiplayer environments like FiveM. I specialize in designing modular and configurable tools that enhance the user experience within online communities. I work with client-server architectures, resource optimization, and adaptation to existing frameworks. While programming isn't my primary field of study, I'm committed to continuous self-directed learning, expanding my knowledge and applying best development practices to every project.
about.p2: In addition to my technical side, I have a strong community involvement. I develop and publish resources for role-playing servers, focusing on scalability and reusability. I also manage the No Man's Sky wiki in Spanish and English, where I organize, structure, and document content for the community.
about.p3: My profile combines a tool-creator mindset, a structural systems vision, and a commitment to digital communities. I don't just develop functionalities; I build solutions designed to be used, maintained, and scaled by others.
